2605.03944.title: TabSurv: Adapting Modern Tabular Neural Networks to Survival Analysis
2605.03944.paper_summary: Survival analysis on tabular data is a well-studied problem. However, existing deep learning methods are often highly task-specific, which can limit the transfer of new approaches from other domains and introduce constraints that may affect performance. We propose TabSurv, an approach that adapts modern tabular architectures to survival analysis using either the Weibull distribution or non-parametric survival prediction. TabSurv optimizes SurvHL, a novel histogram loss function supporting censored data. In addition to a baseline feed-forward network, we implement deep ensembles of MLPs for survival analysis within TabSurv. In contrast to prior work, the ensemble components are trained in parallel, optimizing survival distribution parameters before averaging, which promotes diversity across ensemble component predictions. We perform a comprehensive empirical evaluation of different proposed architectures on 10 diverse real-world survival datasets. Our results show that TabSurv consistently outperforms on average established classical and deep learning baselines, such as RSF, DeepSurv, DeepHit, SurvTRACE. Notably, deep ensembles with Weibull parametrization instead of non-parametric models achieve the highest average rank by C-index. Overall, our study clarifies how modern tabular neural networks can be adapted and trained to tackle survival analysis problems, offering a strong and reliable approach. The TabSurv implementation is publicly available.
2605.03944.paper_summary_zh: 生存分析在表格數據上是一個研究成熟的問題。<lb/>然而，現有的深度學習方法往往高度特定於任務，這可能限制了新方法從其他領域的轉移，並引入可能影響性能的限制。<lb/>我們提出了TabSurv，一種將現代表格架構適應於生存分析的方法，使用威布爾分佈或非參數生存預測。<lb/>TabSurv優化了SurvHL，一種支持截尾數據的新穎直方圖損失函數。<lb/>除了基線前饋網絡外，我們在TabSurv中實現了深度MLP集成以進行生存分析。<lb/>與之前的工作相比，集成組件是並行訓練的，在平均之前優化生存分佈參數，這促進了集成組件預測之間的多樣性。<lb/>我們對10個多樣的現實世界生存數據集進行了不同提出的架構的全面實證評估。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，TabSurv在平均上始終超越了既有的經典和深度學習基準，如RSF、DeepSurv、DeepHit、SurvTRACE。<lb/>值得注意的是，使用威布爾參數化的深度集成模型而非非參數模型在C指數上達到了最高的平均排名。<lb/>總體而言，我們的研究闡明了現代表格神經網絡如何被適應和訓練以解決生存分析問題，提供了一種強大且可靠的方法。<lb/>TabSurv的實現是公開可用的。
2605.03944.author: Stanislav Kirpichenko et.al.
2605.03944.authors: Stanislav Kirpichenko, Andrei Konstantinov, Lev Utkin
